---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2020 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

## Internships

1.  EnerjiSA Retail Prepayment Solutions and Accounting Intern 2023

2.  Başkent EDAŞ Project Intern 2024

# Projects

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

Football,Music,Gym
